name: pj-peru-scraper
description: TypeScript HTTP scraper for Peruvian judicial portals — axios + cheerio, no browser automation

scripts.scrape:oefa:test100: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --limit 100 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/test100/pdfs --out output/test100/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --fresh-output
scripts.scrape:oefa:mineria: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --sector 1 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/mineria/pdfs --out output/mineria/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --fresh-output
scripts.scrape:oefa:mineria:resume: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --sector 1 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/mineria/pdfs --out output/mineria/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --resume
